name: Peanut Butter & Jelly French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread peanut butter on six slices of bread.
2. Spread jelly on the other 6 slices of bread.
3. Put one slice of each together to form sandwiches.
4. In a mixing bowl, lightly beat eggs; add milk and salt and mix together.
5. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Dip sandwiches in egg mixture, coating well.
7. Place the coated sandwiches in the skillet and brown both sides.
8. Serve immediately.
